verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The cross of Calvary Is the story that reminds Your love for me You took my sin and shame So I can live again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You won the victory For you pay the price that set The captives free Death is overcome Worthy is the Lamb

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus Your love is beautiful Jesus Your love is beautiful I'm longing to be close to you my Savior I'm hungry for more and more of You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is power in Your name There is power in Your name There is power in Your name Lord Jesus
